symptom_summary: Display went completely black after dropping device, but phone still vibrates and appears powered on.
most_probable_cause: Internal display connection dislodged or LCD/OLED panel damaged from impact without external screen damage
diagnosis_steps_taken: Verified device powers on through vibration feedback
Checked for visible external damage to screen
Suggested flashlight test in dark room
priority_reason: Device completely unusable due to non-functional display making all visual interactions impossible
escalation_team: Apple Store or authorized service provider hardware repair
recommended_resolution: Professional hardware diagnosis and likely internal display component replacement required
